stemHtml: During a climb, what is the changeover altitude?

options.a: The altitude at which you switch from a climb at constant IAS to a climb at constant Mach.
options.b: The altitude at which you pitch down in order to achieve a preselected Mach number.
options.c: The altitude where you switch from Mach number to indicated airspeed (IAS) in a climb.
options.d: The altitude at which the aircraft automatically transitions to cruise altitude.
